summary: Added 4 new MultiReporter/chain tests to internal/reporter/chain_test.go: TestChain_ThreeFormats_CreatesAllFiles, TestMultiReporter_FansOutToAllReporters, TestMultiReporter_SameEventData, TestMultiReporter_EmptyList_NoPanics. Also added recordingReporter test helper. All 18 chain/MultiReporter tests pass, full build succeeds.
